role: Founder · Product Engineer · Streaming & Game Builder
bullets: Built and operate the Hobo Network — 14 live services including HoboStreamer (live streaming + restream), HoboQuest (browser MMORPG + pixel canvas), HoboMaps (survival resource map), and 200+ tools across hobo.tools subdomains.

Developed HoboStreamer from scratch: WebRTC/HLS ingest, multi-destination RTMP restream, clips, auto-recorded VODs, real-time chat, voice channels, moderation, stream analytics, and paste/file sharing. Fully open source on GitHub.

Built HoboQuest browser MMORPG: server-authoritative tick loop, 7 skill systems, open-world PvP, dungeons, base building, daily quests, collaborative pixel canvas, and live leaderboards. Integrated directly into HoboStreamer for viewer gameplay during broadcasts.
